name: JWT Token Forgery on Go API Gateway
attack_vector: Forge JWT tokens with elevated admin privileges bypassing RSA validation
expected_behavior: Gateway should reject forged tokens and log intrusion attempt
success_criteria: All forged tokens rejected within 100ms, alert generated in Falco

name: Kafka Topic Poisoning with Malformed Schema
attack_vector: Inject malformed Avro messages bypassing Schema Registry validation
expected_behavior: Schema Registry should reject invalid schemas, consumers should handle deserialization errors
success_criteria: Zero malformed messages reach downstream consumers, Schema Registry blocks 100%

name: TimescaleDB Connection Pool Exhaustion
attack_vector: Open maximum concurrent connections to exhaust PostgreSQL connection pool
expected_behavior: Connection pooler should queue excess connections, services should gracefully degrade
success_criteria: No data loss, services recover within 30s of attack stop, audit trail intact

name: Neo4j Cypher Injection Simulation
attack_vector: Submit crafted Cypher queries attempting to read/modify unauthorized graph nodes
expected_behavior: Query parameterization should prevent injection, unauthorized access blocked
success_criteria: All injection attempts return error, no unauthorized data accessed

name: Redis Cache Poisoning
attack_vector: Overwrite cached session tokens and rate-limit counters with malicious values
expected_behavior: Redis ACLs should block unauthorized writes, integrity checks should detect tampering
success_criteria: Poisoned keys detected and purged within 10s, sessions invalidated

name: Falco eBPF Alert Flood
attack_vector: Generate thousands of false-positive syscall alerts to overwhelm Falco processing pipeline
expected_behavior: Self-healing engine should rate-limit alert processing and not auto-quarantine healthy services
success_criteria: No false-positive quarantines, Falco CPU usage stays below 80%
rollback_steps: Verify no healthy containers were killed

name: Container Escape Attempt on Rust Self-Healing Engine
attack_vector: Attempt container breakout via /proc/self/exe exploitation on self-healing container
expected_behavior: Seccomp profile and AppArmor should block escape, Falco should detect attempt
success_criteria: Escape blocked, CRITICAL alert generated within 5s, container isolated

name: MLFlow Model Poisoning Simulation
attack_vector: Register a backdoored ML model version in MLFlow model registry
expected_behavior: Model validation pipeline should detect anomalous model weights before promotion
success_criteria: Poisoned model blocked from production stage, alert raised
rollback_steps: Revert MLFlow model to last known-good version

name: Trivy Scan Evasion Attempt
attack_vector: Deploy container with obfuscated vulnerable packages that evade Trivy detection
expected_behavior: Multi-layer scanning should detect obfuscated vulnerabilities
success_criteria: All known CVEs detected regardless of obfuscation, deployment blocked

name: Post-Quantum Crypto Handshake Failure Injection
attack_vector: Inject malformed post-quantum CRYSTALS-Kyber key exchange packets during TLS handshake
expected_behavior: Access control should reject malformed handshakes and fall back to safe crypto suite
success_criteria: Zero successful connections with invalid quantum-safe parameters
rollback_steps: Verify fallback cipher suite is active

name: Flink Stream Processing Overload
attack_vector: Flood Flink job manager with excessive stream events causing backpressure cascade
expected_behavior: Flink checkpointing should maintain state, backpressure should propagate gracefully upstream
success_criteria: No data loss, checkpoint recovery within 60s, Kafka consumer lag resolves

name: RBAC Privilege Escalation on Go Gateway
attack_vector: Craft JWT with role field set to admin while authenticated as viewer
expected_behavior: RBAC middleware should validate role against JWT signing key, reject tampered tokens
success_criteria: All privilege escalation attempts return 403, audit log captures attempts

name: Rate Limiter Bypass via Redis
attack_vector: Manipulate Redis rate-limit counters to bypass API Gateway request throttling
expected_behavior: Rate limiter should use tamper-resistant counters, detect counter manipulation
success_criteria: Bypass attempts detected and blocked, rate limiting remains enforced
rollback_steps: Reset all rate-limit counters in Redis

name: Kafka Consumer Group Lag Attack
attack_vector: Slow consumer simulation causing message backlog exceeding retention window
expected_behavior: Consumer lag monitoring should trigger alert before data loss occurs
success_criteria: Alert generated when lag exceeds threshold, no messages lost

name: Grafana Dashboard Data Poisoning
attack_vector: Inject false Prometheus metrics to mask ongoing attack in Grafana dashboards
expected_behavior: Metric integrity checks should detect anomalous data patterns
success_criteria: Poisoned metrics flagged within 30s, dashboard integrity alert raised
rollback_steps: Clear Prometheus TSDB for affected time range

name: Prometheus Metric Manipulation
attack_vector: Push fabricated metrics via Pushgateway to hide service degradation
expected_behavior: Prometheus should validate metric sources, alert on unexpected pushgateway usage
success_criteria: Fabricated metrics detected by anomaly detection, real metrics preserved

name: Bio-Auth Trust Score Manipulation
attack_vector: Inject false biometric verification results to artificially elevate trust scores
expected_behavior: Bio-auth service should validate liveness proofs, reject replayed biometric data
success_criteria: Manipulated trust scores detected, user sessions flagged for re-verification
rollback_steps: Reset all active trust scores to zero

name: MITRE ATT&CK Lateral Movement Chain Simulation
attack_vector: Multi-stage: compromise one service then pivot to adjacent services via internal network
expected_behavior: Micro-segmentation should prevent lateral movement, each pivot attempt should trigger alert
success_criteria: Lateral movement blocked at each stage, full kill-chain detected within 60s

name: Supply Chain Attack on Docker Image
attack_vector: Replace base Docker image layer with backdoored version in local registry
expected_behavior: Image digest verification should detect tampered layers, Trivy should flag new vulnerabilities
success_criteria: Backdoored image blocked from deployment, SHA256 mismatch detected

name: CISA KEV Exploit Replay Attack
attack_vector: Replay known exploits from CISA KEV catalog against running services
expected_behavior: WAF and IDS rules should detect and block all known exploit signatures
success_criteria: 100% of replayed CISA KEV exploits blocked, no successful intrusion
rollback_steps: Update WAF rules from latest CISA feed
